Bash(python -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    'D:/Google AI/CodeViz/server.py',
    'D:/Google AI/CodeViz/analyze_viz.py',
    'D:/Google AI/CodeViz/parsers/python_parser.py',
]
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR in {f}: {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
print\('All Python files OK'\)
")
